name: Wells Fargo & Company

profile.description: Wells Fargo is one of the four largest U.S. banks by assets, providing banking, investment, mortgage, and consumer finance services. The company continues to operate under an asset cap imposed by the Fed following the fake accounts scandal.

innovation.label: DEVELOPING
innovation.analysis: Scored 4/10 based on track record, AI deployment, market position, pipeline visibility, and R&D intensity. See yfinance data and web research for evidence [1].

inspiration.label: WEAK
inspiration.analysis: Scored 2/10 based on mission quality, community impact, employee retention, and insider buying signals [1].

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored on available metrics. Liquidity passes ($1,355,931,767 daily) [1].

ai_resilience.label: MODERATE
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (5/9) + AI Opportunity (1/1) = 6/10. Scored based on business model's structural exposure or immunity to AI disruption [1].

infinite_game.summary: Scored 1/10 using 3-2-2-2-1 weighted framework (Just Cause, Courage, Trust, Flexibility, Rivals).
